pi_items.source: verifier.py strictly checks for DASHBOARD_NAME = 'Cumulative FinOps Audit'
verifier.py _find_graph strictly searches for these exact titles
task.json description explicitly assigns this role to the agent
task.json description context involving EC2 and Cloud FinOps
export_result.sh outputs to this file and verifier.py reads from it

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world time-series data from the Numenta Anomaly Benchmark (NAB) realAWSCloudwatch dataset. Specifically, it uses 'ec2_network_in.csv' and 'ec2_disk_write.csv' which are fed into Graphite to represent actual EC2 network and disk metrics. The expected dashboard name 'Cumulative FinOps Audit' and the required graph titles ('Total Network Ingress', 'Total Disk Writes', 'Combined I/O Volume') perfectly match the verifier logic.
